section.title: OUR PROGRAMME
section.description: A comprehensive approach to addressing contemporary challenges. From rights issues to field action.

human_rights.title: Civil Society for Human Rights & Democracy
human_rights.description: Strengthening the role of civil society in upholding human rights and ensuring a substantive and violence-free democratic process.

climate_governance.title: Democratic and Gender-Just Climate Governance
climate_governance.description: Promoting participatory, transparent and gender-responsive climate policies to ensure justice for vulnerable groups.

inclusive_development.title: Inclusive and Equitable Development
inclusive_development.description: Overseeing the development agenda to ensure equitable benefits, reduce inequality, and leave no one behind.
